verses.text: Teach us to pray; 'Our Father... hallowed be thy name'; give us daily bread and forgive us. The model prayer. Christ teaches us to hallow God and seek His provision and pardon.
Teach us to pray; 'Our Father... hallowed be thy name'; give us daily bread and forgive us. The model prayer. Christ teaches us to hallow God and seek His provision and pardon.

A friend at midnight gives, not for friendship, but for 'importunity.' Persistent prayer. God answers the bold and continual asker.
A friend at midnight gives, not for friendship, but for 'importunity.' Persistent prayer. God answers the bold and continual asker.
A friend at midnight gives, not for friendship, but for 'importunity.' Persistent prayer. God answers the bold and continual asker.
A friend at midnight gives, not for friendship, but for 'importunity.' Persistent prayer. God answers the bold and continual asker.
'Ask, and it shall be given... seek... knock.' Sure promise. The praying soul that keeps on coming is not refused.
'Ask, and it shall be given... seek... knock.' Sure promise. The praying soul that keeps on coming is not refused.
If earthly fathers give good gifts, 'how much more shall your heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit?' The best gift. God delights to give His Spirit to them that ask.
If earthly fathers give good gifts, 'how much more shall your heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit?' The best gift. God delights to give His Spirit to them that ask.

He casts out a dumb devil; some say, By Beelzebub; others seek a sign. Blind malice. They credit the work of God to the devil.
He casts out a dumb devil; some say, By Beelzebub; others seek a sign. Blind malice. They credit the work of God to the devil.
He casts out a dumb devil; some say, By Beelzebub; others seek a sign. Blind malice. They credit the work of God to the devil.
A divided kingdom falls; 'if I... cast out devils, no doubt the kingdom of God is come.' Plain proof. His power over demons shows God's reign is here.

A stronger overcomes the armed man; 'he that is not with me is against me.' No neutrality. There is no middle ground with Christ.
A stronger overcomes the armed man; 'he that is not with me is against me.' No neutrality. There is no middle ground with Christ.
A stronger overcomes the armed man; 'he that is not with me is against me.' No neutrality. There is no middle ground with Christ.
The unclean spirit returns with seven worse, and the last state is worse. Empty reform. A heart swept but unfilled is open to deeper evil.
The unclean spirit returns with seven worse, and the last state is worse. Empty reform. A heart swept but unfilled is open to deeper evil.

Blessed is the womb that bare thee; 'rather, blessed are they that hear the word... and keep it.' True blessing. Obedience is more blessed than kinship.
Blessed is the womb that bare thee; 'rather, blessed are they that hear the word... and keep it.' True blessing. Obedience is more blessed than kinship.
No sign but Jonas; Nineveh and the queen of the south shall condemn this generation. Greater light. To slight Christ is worse than the heathen's ignorance.
No sign but Jonas; Nineveh and the queen of the south shall condemn this generation. Greater light. To slight Christ is worse than the heathen's ignorance.

The eye is the body's light; 'if therefore thine eye be single, thy whole body... is full of light.' Singleness. A heart fixed on God fills the life with light.

A Pharisee marvels He washes not; ye cleanse the outside but within are full of rapine. Inward filth. God looks past the surface to the heart.

Woe, ye tithe mint but 'pass over judgment and the love of God.' Lost proportion. They fuss over trifles and neglect the weightier matters.
Woe, ye tithe mint but 'pass over judgment and the love of God.' Lost proportion. They fuss over trifles and neglect the weightier matters.
Woe, ye tithe mint but 'pass over judgment and the love of God.' Lost proportion. They fuss over trifles and neglect the weightier matters.
Woe to the lawyers who load men with burdens and build the prophets' tombs. Hollow honour. They praise dead prophets while sharing their fathers' guilt.
Woe to the lawyers who load men with burdens and build the prophets' tombs. Hollow honour. They praise dead prophets while sharing their fathers' guilt.

The blood of the prophets shall be required of this generation. Filled measure. The long account of bloodshed comes due.
The blood of the prophets shall be required of this generation. Filled measure. The long account of bloodshed comes due.
The blood of the prophets shall be required of this generation. Filled measure. The long account of bloodshed comes due.
Woe, ye took away 'the key of knowledge'; they begin to provoke and waylay Him. Knowledge withheld. They neither entered nor let others in.
